answer: Your card can be blocked immediately through mobile banking, internet banking, ATM services, or customer support.
Please report the transaction immediately. We recommend blocking the affected card and contacting our fraud team.
You can check your account balance through mobile banking, internet banking, ATM, or passbook.
Account statements can be downloaded from internet banking or mobile banking.
Please contact customer support or visit the nearest branch for account verification and reactivation.
ATM PIN can be reset through internet banking, mobile banking, or supported ATMs.
Please report the ATM location, date, and time so our support team can investigate.
Debit cards allow direct access to funds from your bank account.
Credit cards provide a credit limit that can be repaid monthly.
UPI enables instant bank-to-bank transfers using mobile devices.
NEFT is a nationwide electronic funds transfer system.
RTGS enables real-time high-value fund transfers.
IMPS provides instant 24x7 interbank fund transfers.
Fixed Deposits provide guaranteed returns for a fixed tenure.
Savings accounts help customers save money while earning interest.
Current accounts are designed for businesses and high transaction volumes.
Home loans are available with flexible repayment options and competitive interest rates.
Personal loans can be used for various personal expenses subject to eligibility.
Education loans help finance tuition fees and educational expenses.
Current interest rates vary by product and tenure. Please contact customer support for the latest rates.
Cheque books can be requested through internet banking, mobile banking, or branch visits.
You can locate your nearest branch using the bank website or mobile app.
Customer support is available through phone, branch, internet banking, and mobile banking channels.
Please visit our nearest branch to unblock your account
